mapper.select: SELECT * FROM form_submit WHERE submit_id = #{submitId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM form_submit WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM form_submit WHERE form_id = #{formId} AND phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_submit (form_id, user_id, user_name, show_name, phone, company, status, audit_user_id, audit_user_name) VALUES (#{formId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{showName}, #{phone}, #{company}, #{status}, #{auditUserId}, #{auditUserName})
mapper.update:
UPDATE form_submit
status = #{status}, audit_user_id = #{auditUserId}, audit_user_name = #{auditUserName}, audit_time = NOW(),
WHERE submit_id = #{submitId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE form_submit SET deleted = 1 WHERE submit_id = #{submitId}
